app.title: Mewgenics Breeding Manager
menu.file.recalculate_breeding_data.tool: Force full recomputation of breeding data (ignores disk cache)
menu.file.clear_breeding_cache.tooltip: Delete the on-disk breeding cache for the current save file
These values control the simulated annealing search used by the room optimizer and Perfect 7 planner.
Changes take effect the next time either planner runs.
Shared annealing settings live in Settings and apply to both planners.
menu.settings.reset_ui_defaults.title: Reset UI Settings?
menu.settings.reset_ui_defaults.body: This will restore pane sizes, planner inputs, shared search settings, and room optimizer auto-recalculate to their defaults. It will not change pinned cats, Must Breed, breeding blocks, or calibration overrides.

room_optimizer.title: Room Distribution Optimizer
room_optimizer.summary_empty: Run the optimizer to see cat placements.

room_optimizer.optimize_btn_tooltip: Run the optimizer once using the current room and scoring settings.
room_optimizer.mode_tooltip:
Toggle optimizer mode:
Pair Quality = best pair scoring
Family Separation = spread family lines across rooms
room_optimizer.tooltip.avoid_lovers: If enabled, mutual lovers will be placed in the same room and lover pairs get priority in scoring.
room_optimizer.tooltip.prefer_low_aggres: If enabled, optimizer gives extra weight to lower-aggression cats.
room_optimizer.tooltip.prefer_high_libid: If enabled, optimizer gives extra weight to higher-libido cats.
room_optimizer.tooltip.maximize_throughp: Favor layouts with the highest number of simultaneous valid pairs using an exponential density bonus.
room_optimizer.import_planner_tooltip: Load traits from the breeding planner so the optimizer starts from your imported plan.
room_optimizer.more_depth_tooltip: Use simulated annealing for a slower, deeper search.
room_optimizer.more_depth_disabled: More Depth is only available in pair-quality mode.
room_optimizer.tooltip.variance: Variance minimization is available in Pair Quality mode only.
room_optimizer.import_none_tooltip: No traits selected in the planner. Select traits first.

perfect_planner.title: Perfect 7 Planner
perfect_planner.description: Build a staged plan for pushing toward full 7-base-stat lines without family breeding. Use Max inbreeding risk = 0 to force fully clean plans.
perfect_planner.start_pairs_tooltip: How many unrelated foundation pairs the planner should recommend to start the line.
perfect_planner.stimulation_tooltip: Used for projected offspring weighting. Higher stimulation favors the stronger parent stat.
perfect_planner.sa_temperature_tooltip: SA start temperature (0 = auto from score deltas).
perfect_planner.sa_neighbors_tooltip: Neighbor states sampled per SA temperature step.

perfect_planner.offspring_tracker.summar: Build a plan to track offspring outcomes.
{pairs} pairs tracked | {offspring} known offspring already in the save

mutation_planner.pair.no_disorders: Neither parent has disorders to pass.
mutation_planner.pair.note:
Note: This view uses parsed disorder slots from the save file.
Passive abilities are tracked separately and are not included
in these disorder inheritance odds.
mutation_planner.pair.visual_summary: 80% chance all parts are inherited. Stimulation {stim}: mutated parts favored at {favor}%.
mutation_planner.pair.no_visual_mutation: No visual mutations on either parent.
mutation_planner.pair.passive_spell_summ:
Passive inheritance chance: {passive}% (50/50 parent pick)
Spell inheritance chance: {spell}% (50/50 parent pick)
mutation_planner.pair.passive_weighted_p: If a passive IS inherited, weighted odds per entry:
mutation_planner.pair.spell_weighted_pre: If a spell IS inherited, weighted odds per entry:
perfect_planner.stage1.title: Stage 1
perfect_planner.stage1.details: Best unrelated pairs to start pushing 7s immediately
perfect_planner.stage1.summary: Start with {count} unrelated foundation pairs. These are the fastest low-risk lines for reaching full 7-base-stat coverage.
perfect_planner.stage1.note1: Foundation pairs are disjoint so you can work multiple lines at once.
perfect_planner.stage1.note2: Max inbreeding risk is enforced before a pair can appear here.
perfect_planner.stage1.why: Fast foundation pair for a perfect-7 line. Projected 7+ coverage: {coverage}/7 at stimulation {stim}. Breakpoint: {headline}. {hints}
perfect_planner.stage1.children: Keep the strongest son and daughter if possible. Do not reuse siblings together.
perfect_planner.stage1.rotate: Stay on this pair until the line stops improving, then use the Stage 3 outcross.
perfect_planner.stage2.title: Stage 2
perfect_planner.stage2.details: Room guidance to avoid collapsing the plan into sibling loops
perfect_planner.stage2.summary: Separate offspring by line and sex. The planner assumes you will keep clean branches available for the next generation instead of breeding within one family.
perfect_planner.stage2.note1: This stage is the child-separation guidance from issue #19.
perfect_planner.stage2.note2: If you only keep one kitten, keep the one that raises the lowest missing stat.
perfect_planner.stage2.why: Keeping sons and daughters apart preserves multiple clean branches instead of collapsing into sibling breeding.
perfect_planner.stage2.children: Move Pair {index} sons and daughters into different rooms from each other and from {a} / {b} once they mature.
perfect_planner.stage2.rotate: Choose one keeper line per sex, then hold the backups aside for future outcrosses.
perfect_planner.stage3.title: Stage 3
perfect_planner.stage3.goal: Rotate partners before the line stalls
perfect_planner.stage3.details: When and why to outcross instead of breeding inward
perfect_planner.stage3.summary: Rotate into unrelated or lower-risk partners when a line is missing specific 7s. This is the long-term maintenance step from issue #26.
perfect_planner.stage3.note1: Rotation advice is based on the missing 7-stat coverage from each foundation pair.
perfect_planner.stage3.note2: If no candidate appears, the roster is telling you to wait for a cleaner founder.
perfect_planner.stage3.why_none: No clean outcross in the current roster covers the missing stats under the active risk cap.
perfect_planner.stage3.children_none: Keep the best backup kitten alive and wait for an unrelated stray or future outcross.
perfect_planner.stage3.rotate_none: Bring in a stray/unrelated breeder with 7s in {stats}.
perfect_planner.stage3.why_rotation: Use this {source} outcross when Pair {index} stalls on {missing}. It covers missing 7-stats without falling back to family breeding. Projected 7+ coverage: {coverage}/7 at stimulation {stim}. Breakpoint: {headline}. {hints}
perfect_planner.stage3.children_rotation: Promote the kitten that keeps the old locked stats while adding the missing stat coverage.
perfect_planner.stage3.rotate_rotation: Swap once the current line stops improving or when siblings would be your next obvious match.
perfect_planner.stage4.title: Stage 4
perfect_planner.stage4.goal: Maintain and finish the strongest lines
perfect_planner.stage4.details: How to convert the strongest keeper lines into durable perfect cats
perfect_planner.stage4.summary: Use the strongest keepers to finish the line, then preserve it with unrelated backups instead of letting the plan collapse into inbred maintenance.
perfect_planner.stage4.note1: The planner is optimizing toward perfect 7-base-stat coverage, not short-term room fill.
perfect_planner.stage4.note2: Set Max inbreeding risk to 0 for the cleanest possible plan.
perfect_planner.stage4.action_finish: Finish Pair {index} through a keeper outcross
perfect_planner.stage4.why_finish: Once a keeper from this line is close to all 7s, use the Stage 3 rotation target rather than breeding back into siblings or parents.
perfect_planner.stage4.children_finish: Keep one opposite-sex backup in a different room so the finished line survives bad rolls.
perfect_planner.stage4.rotate_finish: Retire the weaker branch once the new keeper strictly improves the missing stats.
perfect_planner.stage4.why_maintain: This line already covers every target stat. The goal shifts from climbing to preserving.
perfect_planner.stage4.children_maintain: Keep a primary breeder and a backup of the opposite sex in separate rooms.
perfect_planner.stage4.rotate_maintain: Only bring in an unrelated stray if you need redundancy or the risk cap tightens.
mutation_planner.single_trait.mutation_h:
Visual mutations: 80% chance all parts inherited. Mutated part favored at {favor}% (stim {stim}).

Strategy: Breed a carrier with any cat. The offspring has a high chance of inheriting the mutated body part(s) from the carrier parent.
mutation_planner.single_trait.passive_he:
Passive/disorder inheritance: {chance}% chance per breeding (stim {stim}), 50/50 parent pick.
If both parents carry it: ~{chance}% chance, but either parent can pass it.
Disorders specifically: 15% flat chance from each parent.

Strategy: Pair two carriers together for the best odds. If only one carrier exists, breed them and hope for inheritance, then breed carriers from the next generation together.
mutation_planner.single_trait.ability_he:
Spell/ability inheritance: {chance}% chance per breeding (stim {stim}), 50/50 parent pick.

Strategy: Breed a carrier with any cat. If both parents have the ability, either can pass it.

cat_detail.pedigree_repaired_note: One or more parent links were broken while loading this save to prevent a pedigree cycle.
